title: Xtra Gooey Dutch Coconut Bake
description: A traditional Dutch dessert featuring desiccated coconut and a gooey center, perfect for a sick day, baked to perfection in a wood-fired oven. This dish is free from onions and garlic, making it suitable for those with sensitivities.
instructions: Preheat the wood-fired oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, brown sugar, and salt.
Add the melted butter, eggs, milk, and vanilla extract to the bowl and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Pour the batter into a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake for 35 minutes or until the edges are set and the center is still slightly gooey.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve warm, topped with additional desiccated coconut if desired.
